title: Robust Poblano Burrito
description: A flavorful burrito filled with roasted poblano peppers, robust beef, and spices. This dish is perfect for a hearty lunch or dinner.
instructions: 2. Roast the poblano peppers for 30 minutes, turning occasionally.
3. Remove the peppers from the oven and let them cool.
4. Peel the skin off the peppers and dice them.
5. In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned.
6. Add the onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
7. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the onion is translucent.
8. Add the diced poblano peppers to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
9. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
10. Assemble the burritos by spooning the beef and pepper mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese.
